role_title: Senior Lead Program Manager, Technical Programs

level_signals: 10+ years of experience in technical program management
Comp range $192K-$288K base, consistent with senior/staff IC
Multi-year platform strategy ownership, cross-functional leadership

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of experience in technical program management within a fast-paced engineering environment (ideally SaaS or high-growth tech).
Proven ability to successfully manage a perpetual program with a rolling roadmap
Demonstrated ability to manage multiple priorities and deliver results across complex, cross-functional programs.
Strong project management skills with fluency in tools such as Asana, Jira, Linear or Smartsheet.

scope.surface: Core technology platform supporting a key customer vertical (enterprise-facing SaaS platform)
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS, ecommerce marketing / first-party data platform
core_responsibilities: Partner with Engineering and Product to define the multi-year technical strategy and roadmap
Prioritize and program manage strategic, non-functional programs (e.g., technical debt, capacity planning, architecture scaling) and specific enterprise initiatives
Oversee the full lifecycle of platform features, from technical design to implementation
Define clear ways of working, create frameworks for cross-team collaboration, establish content repositories
Serve as the primary communication leader, tailoring information to secure buy-in and consensus across engineering and business leadership
Drive a mindset of operational excellence, challenging existing processes and implementing solutions that prioritize automation over manual efforts

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as part of total compensation package

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($192K-$288K base) and competitive for TPM level
Clear product surface: core technology platform with enterprise focus
Explicit encouragement to apply even if not an exact match
AI fluency and responsible AI use are part of company culture
Role has strategic authority including multi-year roadmap ownership
red_flags: No preferred/nice-to-have qualifications listed — hard to differentiate what makes a standout candidate
Location type is ambiguous: no specific city listed, but travel requirement implies some in-person expectation; work_auth and visa sponsorship not addressed
Wide comp range ($96K spread) may indicate significant location or level variability
No people management component stated but 'Senior Lead' title may carry implicit leadership expectations not articulated

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range, years, and title)

scope.business_model (inferred from company description and platform context)
